arts.ttl: How to watch Esperance Tunis vs Chelsea in Club World Cup for FREE in the UK
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca's Chelsea are set to take on Maher Kanzari's Esperance Sportive de Tunis in the FIFA Club World Cup - here's the kick-off time, streaming details and team news

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca to rest players for Chelsea vs Esperance de Tunis at Club World Cup
arts.sum: The Blues need only avoid defeat against the Tunisian side in Philadelphia to be assured of a place in the last 16.
